sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49684" key="i)ambe/legos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰαμβ-έλεγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, an asynartete verse, formed by substituting an iambic penthemimer for the former half of a pentameter, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.11</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
